content: SaaS billing table stakes with Stripe: subscription checkout (flat-rate, per-seat, tiered), free trial with reminder emails (card-on-file trials convert 2-3x better), Stripe Customer Portal for self-serve plan change/cancel/payment-method/invoice history, automatic invoices, proration on mid-cycle seat changes, dunning/failed-payment recovery emails, webhooks driving app entitlements. Per-seat billing + customer portal + webhook-driven access control is the minimal viable pattern.
